history.reason: Created /developers page (~580L) with 8 API endpoint groups, 4-language code examples, 25 integration tests.

history.phase: Sentry Web Integration — sentry.ts lib, client/server/edge configs
history.reason: sentry.ts lib, client/server/edge configs, global-error.tsx + error.tsx boundaries, CSP update, 11 tests.

history.phase: Gate 1 — Scraper Stability Tracker (14-day consecutive clean hours clock)
history.reason: stability-tracker.ts (240L) with runStabilityCheck()/recordUnhandledException(); 60-min cron; GET /api/v1/admin/scraper/stability; ScraperGate1Status.tsx (229L); 829L tests. Commit: be47ab4.

vercel.json (root): nextjs framework, pnpm turbo filter build, 3-region deploy (iad1/lhr1/sin1), security headers (HSTS/XFO/XCTO/Permissions-Policy), /api/v1/* + /ws/* rewrites to api.world-pulse.io, smart ignore command. apps/web/.env.example: all 8 NEXT_PUBLIC_ vars documented with dev defaults and Sentry optional setup. Fixed stale localhost:4000 in clusters/page.tsx → localhost:3001 (port consistency). vercel-config.test.ts: 18 assertions covering JSON validity, schema, secrets safety, header presence, rewrite targets. git commit blocked by NTFS index.lock — files on disk, commit from Windows PS.

history.phase: Integration Phase 1 — Cloudflare real-IP trust middleware
history.reason: nginx/conf.d/cloudflare.conf: real_ip_header CF-Connecting-IP, real_ip_recursive on, all 15 CF IPv4 + 7 CF IPv6 CIDR blocks — fixes $remote_addr for rate limiting when behind CF. apps/api/src/middleware/cloudflare.ts (175L): isCloudflareIp() CIDR range check, isValidCfRay() regex guard, isValidCfIp() injection guard, Fastify plugin decorates req.cfClientIp/cfRay/isBehindCloudflare on every request, echoes X-CF-Ray + X-Real-Client-IP in responses, buildCfAwareKeyGenerator() (user-id > CF-IP > req.ip). index.ts updated: cloudflareMiddlewarePlugin registered before rateLimit, keyGenerator swapped to buildCfAwareKeyGenerator. 20-test suite (cloudflare-middleware.test.ts). git commit blocked by NTFS index.lock — run from Windows PS.
